details.expected_goal: Capture the user's profile details, including name and city, to personalize the conversation.
details.actual_goal: Identify user profile context and store user name and city for personalization.

details.expected_goal: The user inquired about product delivery availability. Use the RAG-based FAQ bot to provide the answer.
details.actual_goal: User asked a product availability question. Use RAG-based ConversationalBot to answer.

details.expected_goal: User wants to place an item order. Forward this request to the Order Placement service.
details.actual_goal: User wants to place an order. Route request to OrderTool.

details.expected_goal: The user intends to update their shipping address. Route this to the Address Update tool.
details.actual_goal: User wants to create a ticket. Route to createticketTool.
details.justification: Incorrect user intent and tool routing; Actual Plan misinterprets address update as ticket creation and routes to wrong tool.
